name: Heartbeat Monitor V1 Lean
description: R22 heartbeat monitor with top error sources, activation state-change reminders/links, orphan API throttle, humanized control-plane labels, grouped delivery cache, and classifier drift display.

parameters.query:
WITH recover_open AS (
  UPDATE circuit_state SET status='half_open', error_count=0, updated_at=NOW(), half_open_at=NOW()
  WHERE circuit_key='supervisor' AND status='open' AND last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
  RETURNING circuit_key,status,'open' AS previous_status,'heartbeat-recovery-'||FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())*1000)::BIGINT AS trace_id,5 AS cooldown_minutes
), reset_half_open AS (
  UPDATE circuit_state SET status='closed', error_count=0, updated_at=NOW(), half_open_at=NULL
  WHERE circuit_key='supervisor' AND status='half_open' AND last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM recover_open)
  RETURNING circuit_key,status,'half_open' AS previous_status,'heartbeat-recovery-'||FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())*1000)::BIGINT AS trace_id,10 AS cooldown_minutes
), all_transitions AS (SELECT * FROM recover_open UNION ALL SELECT * FROM reset_half_open), transition_log AS (
  INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id,event_type,workflow_name,execution_id,severity,status,payload)
  SELECT trace_id,'circuit_transition','Heartbeat Monitor','heartbeat','info',status,jsonb_build_object('from',previous_status,'to',status,'reason','heartbeat_recovery_probe','cooldown_minutes',cooldown_minutes) FROM all_transitions RETURNING id
)
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM all_transitions) AS transitions_count,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transition_log) AS transitions_logged,(SELECT status FROM circuit_state WHERE circuit_key='supervisor') AS current_status

WITH cs AS (
  SELECT COALESCE((SELECT status FROM circuit_state WHERE circuit_key='supervisor'),'closed') AS circuit_status,
         COALESCE((SELECT error_count FROM circuit_state WHERE circuit_key='supervisor'),0) AS error_count,
         (SELECT half_open_at FROM circuit_state WHERE circuit_key='supervisor') AS half_open_at
), evt AS (
  SELECT event_type, workflow_name, failed_node, fingerprint, created_at, status,
         CASE WHEN event_type='error_alert' THEN payload->>'category' ELSE NULL END AS evt_category
  FROM supervisor_events WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
), agg AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='processed' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AS errors_last_hour,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='processed') AS errors_last_24h,
         MAX(created_at) FILTER (WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='processed') AS last_error_at,
         MAX(created_at) FILTER (WHERE event_type='retention_completed') AS last_retention_at,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='retry_submitted' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AS retries_last_hour,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='retry_submitted') AS retries_last_24h,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='retry_submit_failed' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AS retry_failures_1h,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='retry_submit_failed') AS retry_failures_24h,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type='circuit_transition' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours') AS circuit_transitions_2h,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='processed' AND COALESCE(evt_category,'')='unknown') AS unknown_errors_24h,
         COUNT(DISTINCT fingerprint) FILTER (WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='processed' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes') AS distinct_fps_5m,
         COUNT(DISTINCT workflow_name) FILTER (WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='processed' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes') AS distinct_workflows_5m
  FROM evt
), top_src AS (
  SELECT workflow_name, failed_node, COUNT(*) AS error_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AS errors_1h
  FROM evt WHERE event_type='error_alert' AND status='processed'
  GROUP BY workflow_name, failed_node ORDER BY error_count DESC LIMIT 5
)
SELECT cs.*, agg.*, COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM top_src t),'[]'::jsonb) AS top_error_sources FROM cs CROSS JOIN agg

INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id,event_type,workflow_name,execution_id,severity,status,payload) SELECT 'orphan-'||(o->>'executionId')||'-'||FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())*1000)::BIGINT,'orphan_detected',o->>'workflowName',o->>'executionId','warning','detected',jsonb_build_object('orphanCount',(o->>'orphanCount')::integer,'runningMinutes',(o->>'runningMinutes')::integer,'workflowId',o->>'workflowId','isReAlert',COALESCE((o->>'isReAlert')::boolean,false)) FROM jsonb_array_elements($1::jsonb) AS o ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id,event_type,workflow_name,execution_id,severity,status,payload) VALUES ('heartbeat-'||FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())*1000)::BIGINT,'heartbeat','Heartbeat Monitor','heartbeat',CASE WHEN ($1::jsonb)->>'isDegraded'='true' THEN 'warning' ELSE 'info' END,CASE WHEN ($1::jsonb)->>'isDegraded'='true' THEN 'degraded' ELSE 'healthy' END,$1::jsonb)

parameters.jsCode: var complete=$input.first().json||{};var sd=$getWorkflowStaticData('global');var start={};try{start=$('HTTP (DMS Start)').first().json||{}}catch(e){}function err(x){return x&&x.error&&x.error.message?String(x.error.message):''}var se=err(start),ce=err(complete),bad=!!(se||ce),msg=se&&ce?'DMS start failed: '+se+' | DMS complete failed: '+ce:se?'DMS start failed: '+se:ce?'DMS complete failed: '+ce:'';if(bad)sd.lastDeadMansSwitchFailure=msg;else delete sd.lastDeadMansSwitchFailure;return[{json:{dmsFailure:bad,dmsOk:!bad,dmsStartOk:!se,dmsCompleteOk:!ce,dmsErrorMessage:msg}}];

parameters.content:
## 💓 Heartbeat Monitor V1 Lean (Round 22 Build)
**21 executable nodes + 1 sticky. R22 internal hardening, zero new nodes.**

- R22: top_error_sources rendered in heartbeat
- R22: activation alerts are state-change/6h reminder based with editor links
- R22: orphan API error alert throttled to 30m
- R22: control-plane labels humanized and delivery cache grouped
- R22: classifier drift warning restored; dead last_heartbeat_at/dataMissing removed
- R21: orphan cleanup, recovery duration/reasons, tag-safe clamp
